title: ligustrum vulgare var. insulense
intro: Ligustrum vulgare var. insulense, also known as Privet, is a variety of flowering shrub native to the Channel Islands. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Privet has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. The plant's leaves and berries are said to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving rheumatism, and promoting digestion. Herbal preparations of Privet can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat colds, flu, and other respiratory issues.
